insight: PAPI placeholders are queried from async threads by scoreboard/tab plugins (TAB, FeatherBoard). Any placeholder that scans Bukkit chunks/entities (e.g. `corearena_<arena>_mobcount`, `nearestmob`, `nearestmobmeters` via `SimpleCuboidRegion#getEntities`) will NPE on Paper or hit thread-safety guards. Fix: maintain a `volatile` snapshot refreshed on the main thread (entity spawn/death + phase tick) and have async placeholder paths read the cached snapshot instead of touching chunks.
